episodes.title: Jeffrey Epstein survivor to share her story at the University of Michigan
episodes.description:
Jones says it was all about power. She describes Jeffrey Epstein as a monster who took away her and her friend's innocence at 14-years-old at his home in Florida.


She’s spoken about her journey publicly a number of times in the past.

episodes.title: Religious group defector says he escaped a Detroit area cult, pastor says those who disagree, go aga
episodes.description: Craig Stasio claims he's not the leader of a cult, even though he has been accused of that, for years.
